payload.label: fan
payload.long_description: Ceiling-mounted five-blade fan with dark wood blades and a central frosted glass light globe that is illuminated; metallic central hub and collar visible; several blades are partially edge-cropped in the image; appears approximately 2.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"fan","short_description":"dark wooden five-blade ceiling fan","long_description":"Ceiling-mounted five-blade fan with dark wood blades and a central frosted glass light globe that is illuminated; metallic central hub and collar visible; several blades are partially edge-cropped in the image; appears approximately 2.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["five blades","dark wood finish","frosted glass light globe","light illuminated","metallic central hub","partial/edge-cropped blades","ceiling-mounted"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
